SEARCH
Package com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song

Class Groove

java.lang.Object
com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song.Groove
public class Groove extends Object

A class that models a musical "groove", which gives slightly different stresses and lengths of notes in a score. A groove is modeled as a sequence of beats.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Class

    static class 
    Groove.Builder
    A builder for Groove class.
    static final record 
    Groove.Unit
    A class that stores a result of resolve(Fraction).

  • Method Details

    • calculateGrooveAccent

      public int calculateGrooveAccent(Fraction relPosInStroke, Fraction relativePositionInBar)

    • calculateAbsolutePositionInTicks

      public long calculateAbsolutePositionInTicks(Fraction relativePositionInStroke, Fraction relativePositionInBar, long barPositionInTicks)

    • length

      public Fraction length()

    • resolve

      public Groove.Unit resolve(Fraction offset)

      Resolves a position and accent, where a note at the given offset from a bar should be played, if this Groove object is applied.

      Parameters:
      offset - An offset from the beginning of a bar.
      Returns:
      An object that indicates how a note at offset should be played.

    • createGroove

      public static Groove createGroove(com.google.gson.JsonArray grooveDef)

      Creates a new Groove object from a given JsonArray object.

      The grooveDef should look like as follows:

      grooveDef
      [
  {
    "length": "1/16",
    "ticks": 24,
    "accent": 10
  },
  "..."
]
      Parameters:
      grooveDef - A definition of a groove.
      Returns:
      A new groove object
